title: Silent Armadillo
description: Reduces all armadillo sounds by 85%. Perfect for armadillo xp Farms.
body:
## Silent Armadillo — All armadillo sounds reduced by 85%

Silent Armadillo reduces every single armadillo sound event by 85%, so they are still audible but no longer intrusive. This makes it especially useful for Armadillo XP farms, where armadillos are damaged repeatedly and would otherwise flood your audio with hurt sounds on loop.
